title: FCB Configuration
description: Configuration file for the FCB cloud cost browsing CLI.

source_files.description: Paths to the parquet files containing FOCUS schema cost exports.

excluded_fields.description: Field names that must be omitted from the response. Mutually exclusive with included_fields.

included_fields.description: Field names to keep in the response; all other fields are omitted. Mutually exclusive with excluded_fields.
